title: Kanna Laddu Thinna Aasaiya
desc: Shiva and his friends fall for Soumya, a beautiful woman who recently moved into their locality. The three friends start competing with one another to win her affections.

title: Sivapathikaram
desc: Professor Elango decides to go to his native village. When the elections take place in the village, the candidates are murdered and the police arrest one of Ilango's students, Sathyamoorthy.

title: Velaiilla Pattadhari
desc: Raghuvaran, an educated yet unemployed engineer, is unwilling to accept jobs that are unrelated to his area of expertise. Soon, his mother's tragic death brings him a job as well as grave challenges.

title: Bogan
desc: A police officer probes a seasoned robber, oblivious to his hidden power, which allows him to possess people through eye contact.

title: Jigarthanda Double X
desc: In the 1970s, a convict who aspires to be a policeman embarks on an undercover mission as a film-maker to kill a gangster who wants to launch himself as an actor.
